assertions.description: Zero signal analysis results - no voltage dividers, RC filters, regulators, crystals, or any other signal patterns detected on a 208-component flight controller board
Flight controller should have: IMU (accelerometer/gyroscope), barometer, voltage regulators, motor driver outputs, RC receiver input - none detected
No design observations generated at all
12 ICs not analyzed for any signal paths - likely includes STM32 MCU, IMU sensors, regulators
REVIEW: Dual naming of 3.3V rail as both +3.3V and +3V3 suggests possible net aliasing issue in the legacy parser
